action.reasoning: Observation: Importing torch-geometric or torch-scatter causes segfault/bad_alloc due to binary incompatibility with PyTorch 2.11.0+cu128. We cannot use PyG at all. Analysis: Need a pure-PyTorch implementation of graph neural network using manual index_add_ for message passing and pooling. This is feasible and avoids broken extension libraries. Decision: Rewrite model.py, train.py, predict.py with pure PyTorch manual batching and MPNN. Run a 1-epoch sanity check, then submit eval with 2 epochs to establish baseline and measure time.
